67afdcdf819f694665ab130b7ad28cc1.message: What is the scheme for house?
67afdcdf819f694665ab130b7ad28cc1.response: For PM Awas Yojana, you can apply online on official government portal. In this, eligible families get financial assistance to build house.

3085371a842fdaebe609cdab7eff0ace.message: Ration card ke liye documents kya chahiye?
3085371a842fdaebe609cdab7eff0ace.response: Ration card banwane ke liye aapko identity proof, address proof aur income certificate ki zarurat hogi. Aap apne state food supply portal par online apply kar sakte ho.

4c82898c4143d196784243ad35b5dcb4.message: What documents are needed for ration card?
4c82898c4143d196784243ad35b5dcb4.response: To make ration card, you will need identity proof, address proof and income certificate. You can apply online on your state food supply portal.

87da459fe94990e05ef7840f3b90e66d.response: Sewer overflow ek sanitation problem hai. Aap sewer ya drainage complaint register kar sakte ho.

65b3abe2afaa24744bd6a92cbf63b478.response: Sewer overflow is a sanitation problem. You can register a sewer or drainage complaint.

623224c84f2829ef1a3cf709128883b4.response: Sewer overflow एक sanitation problem है। आप sewer या drainage complaint register कर सकते हो।

07809053347592afa5f230db2684ad54.response: Ayushman Bharat Yojana (Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana - PMJAY) Bharat ki sabse badi health insurance scheme hai jo September 2018 me launch hui thi. Isme eligible families ko har saal 5 lakh rupaye tak ka free medical treatment milta hai. Yeh scheme garib aur middle class families ke liye hai. Isme 1,350+ medical procedures cover hote hain jaise surgery, medicines, diagnostic tests, hospitalization, aur follow-up care. Aap India ke kisi bhi empanelled hospital me cashless treatment le sakte ho. Scheme me 10 crore se zyada families (50 crore+ log) covered hain. Yeh duniya ki sabse badi government funded health scheme hai.

f81e61eee6e2957f6855bf1405c41098.response: Ayushman Bharat Yojana (Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana - PMJAY) is India's largest health insurance scheme launched in September 2018. It provides eligible families with free medical treatment up to 5 lakh rupees per year. This scheme is designed for poor and middle class families. It covers 1,350+ medical procedures including surgery, medicines, diagnostic tests, hospitalization, and follow-up care. You can get cashless treatment at any empanelled hospital across India. The scheme covers more than 10 crore families (50+ crore people). It is the world's largest government funded health scheme.

eaf2531ab8681c8b31847b1d9c9700a0.response:
Ayushman card banwane ke liye yeh detailed steps follow karein:

1. ELIGIBILITY CHECK:
   - Ayushman Bharat website (pmjay.gov.in) par jaayein
   - Apna mobile number aur Aadhaar/Ration card number enter karein
   - System batayega ki aap eligible hain ya nahi

2. DOCUMENTS TAYYAR KAREIN:
   - Aadhaar card (mandatory)
   - Ration card (if available)
   - Address proof (bijli bill, rent agreement, etc.)
   - Family ID proof

3. CSC/HOSPITAL VISIT:
   - Nearest Common Service Center (CSC) ya empanelled hospital jaayein
   - Apne documents dikhaayein
   - Operator aapki details verify karega

4. CARD PRINTING:
   - Verification ke baad card instantly print ho jayega
   - Card bilkul FREE hai, koi charge nahi
   - Card me aapka naam, photo, aur family details hongi

5. ACTIVATION:
   - Card turant active ho jata hai
   - Aap kisi bhi empanelled hospital me treatment le sakte hain

HELPLINE: 14555 (toll-free) - Kisi bhi problem ke liye call karein

f9801ae2db1b82a8f885e99f1f3f419f.response:
To make Ayushman card, follow these detailed steps:

1. ELIGIBILITY CHECK:
   - Visit Ayushman Bharat website (pmjay.gov.in)
   - Enter your mobile number and Aadhaar/Ration card number
   - System will tell you if you are eligible

2. PREPARE DOCUMENTS:
   - Aadhaar card (mandatory)
   - Ration card (if available)
   - Address proof (electricity bill, rent agreement, etc.)
   - Family ID proof

3. VISIT CSC/HOSPITAL:
   - Go to nearest Common Service Center (CSC) or empanelled hospital
   - Show your documents
   - Operator will verify your details

4. CARD PRINTING:
   - After verification, card will be printed instantly
   - Card is completely FREE, no charges
   - Card will have your name, photo, and family details

5. ACTIVATION:
   - Card gets activated immediately
   - You can get treatment at any empanelled hospital

HELPLINE: 14555 (toll-free) - Call for any issues

b152a307e2e3b2174282b1b4e0f5a477.message: Ayushman card ke liye eligible kaun hai?
b152a307e2e3b2174282b1b4e0f5a477.response:
Ayushman Bharat scheme me yeh log eligible hain:

1. SECC 2011 DATA:
   - Socio-Economic Caste Census 2011 me listed families automatically eligible hain

2. RURAL AREAS CRITERIA:
   - Kaccha ghar (mud house) me rehne wale
   - Ghar me koi adult member (16-59 years) nahi
   - Female headed household (mahila mukhiya)
   - Disabled member wale families
   - SC/ST (Scheduled Caste/Tribe) families
   - Landless laborers (bhoomihin majdoor)
   - Manual scavengers
   - Primitive tribal groups

3. URBAN AREAS CRITERIA:
   - Rag pickers (kachra bechne wale)
   - Beggars (bhikhari)
   - Domestic workers (ghar ka kaam karne wale)
   - Street vendors (rehri wale)
   - Construction workers (nirman majdoor)
   - Plumbers, electricians, painters
   - Transport workers (rickshaw pullers, drivers)
   - Sweepers, sanitation workers

4. ELIGIBILITY CHECK:
   - Website: pmjay.gov.in
   - Toll-free helpline: 14555
   - Nearest CSC center

5. IMPORTANT:
   - Agar aapka naam SECC list me hai to aap automatically eligible hain
   - Income limit nahi hai, SECC criteria se decide hota hai

05032238f782e5678675664e888a9e80.message: Who is eligible for Ayushman card?
05032238f782e5678675664e888a9e80.response:
Following people are eligible for Ayushman Bharat scheme:

1. SECC 2011 DATA:
   - Families listed in Socio-Economic Caste Census 2011 are automatically eligible

2. RURAL AREAS CRITERIA:
   - Living in kaccha house (mud house)
   - No adult member in household (16-59 years)
   - Female headed household
   - Families with disabled member
   - SC/ST (Scheduled Caste/Tribe) families
   - Landless laborers
   - Manual scavengers
   - Primitive tribal groups

3. URBAN AREAS CRITERIA:
   - Rag pickers
   - Beggars
   - Domestic workers
   - Street vendors
   - Construction workers
   - Plumbers, electricians, painters
   - Transport workers (rickshaw pullers, drivers)
   - Sweepers, sanitation workers

4. ELIGIBILITY CHECK:
   - Website: pmjay.gov.in
   - Toll-free helpline: 14555
   - Nearest CSC center

5. IMPORTANT:
   - If your name is in SECC list, you are automatically eligible
   - No income limit, decided by SECC criteria

f29c7b6f7e0637fa7e1b6f9f0040dde0.response:

2. RURAL AREAS CRITERIA:

   - घर में कोई adult member (16-59 years) नहीं
   - Female headed household (महिला मुखिया)
   - Disabled member वाले families
   - SC/ST (Scheduled Caste/Tribe) families
   - Landless laborers (भूमिहीन मजदूर)
   - Manual scavengers
   - Primitive tribal groups

3. URBAN AREAS CRITERIA:
   - Rag pickers (कचरा बेचने वाले)
   - Beggars (भिखारी)
   - Domestic workers (घर का काम करने वाले)
   - Street vendors (रेहड़ी वाले)
   - Construction workers (निर्माण मजदूर)
   - Plumbers, electricians, painters
   - Transport workers (rickshaw pullers, drivers)
   - Sweepers, sanitation workers

4. ELIGIBILITY CHECK:
   - Website: pmjay.gov.in
   - Toll-free helpline: 14555
   - Nearest CSC center

5. IMPORTANT:
   - अगर आपका नाम SECC list में है तो आप automatically eligible हैं
   - Income limit नहीं है, SECC criteria से decide होता है

f1b5f2b44bacd36dd42cf64e4c0ca000.response: अगर बिजली supply में problem है तो आप electricity complaint register कर सकते हो। इससे electricity department को issue की जानकारी मिल जाएगी।

28e3ca6cf224cde2ee85209b602dbf6d.response: I'm here to help with civic issues. You can report problems, track complaints, or ask me questions about Vaani. What would you like to know?

95c029d98a0e266edd069a847fd95481.response: Vaani is a smart AI assistant that helps people with government services and civic complaints. Here you can report issues like road, water, electricity and sanitation.

81e040e9ddffe2c8a4ba9411831fe3bd.response: Vaani works in simple steps: 1) Login to your account, 2) Choose what you want to do (report, track, or get info), 3) Follow the guided process, 4) Get updates and notifications. It's designed to be easy for everyone to use.

7773ed41636da658fb9e677bdc64b6a9.response: To report an issue: First, say 'report an issue' and I'll open the form. You can report potholes, water leaks, broken streetlights, garbage problems, or any civic issue. Just describe the problem and add a photo if possible.

4ed1b3199eb65bf3aac2b323f7447f5e.response: To report an issue: First, say 'report an issue' and I'll open the form. You can report potholes, water leaks, broken streetlights, garbage problems, or any civic issue. Just describe the problem and add a photo if possible.

0bd20b7c47db44db18ea24043a46ae79.response: मैं नागरिक मुद्दों में मदद के लिए यहाँ हूँ। आप समस्याओं की रिपोर्ट कर सकते हैं, शिकायतों को ट्रैक कर सकते हैं, या मुझसे वाणी के बारे में सवाल पूछ सकते हैं। आप क्या जानना चाहेंगे?

6ff5e031ec49f0218719b10aeaed4dc5.response: मैं नागरिक मुद्दों में मदद के लिए यहाँ हूँ। आप समस्याओं की रिपोर्ट कर सकते हैं, शिकायतों को ट्रैक कर सकते हैं, या मुझसे वाणी के बारे में सवाल पूछ सकते हैं। आप क्या जानना चाहेंगे?

974aae398e7c12f5cf4358e175f483f5.response: वाणी सरल चरणों में काम करती है: 1) अपने खाते में लॉगिन करें, 2) चुनें कि आप क्या करना चाहते हैं, 3) निर्देशित प्रक्रिया का पालन करें, 4) अपडेट और सूचनाएं प्राप्त करें। यह सभी के लिए उपयोग करना आसान है।

71f4730f2d416533612f6a52137f1041.response:
Ayushman Bharat योजना में ये लोग eligible हैं:

1. SECC 2011 DATA:
   - Socio-Economic Caste Census 2011 में listed families automatically eligible हैं

2. RURAL AREAS CRITERIA:
   - कच्चा घर (mud house) में रहने वाले
   - घर में कोई adult member (16-59 years) नहीं
   - Female headed household (महिला मुखिया)
   - Disabled member वाले families
   - SC/ST (Scheduled Caste/Tribe) families
   - Landless laborers (भूमिहीन मजदूर)
   - Manual scavengers
   - Primitive tribal groups

3. URBAN AREAS CRITERIA:
   - Rag pickers (कचरा बेचने वाले)
   - Beggars (भिखारी)
   - Domestic workers (घर का काम करने वाले)
   - Street vendors (रेहड़ी वाले)
   - Construction workers (निर्माण मजदूर)
   - Plumbers, electricians, painters
   - Transport workers (rickshaw pullers, drivers)
   - Sweepers, sanitation workers

4. ELIGIBILITY CHECK:
   - Website: pmjay.gov.in
   - Toll-free helpline: 14555
   - Nearest CSC center

5. IMPORTANT:
   - अगर आपका नाम SECC list में है तो आप automatically eligible हैं
   - Income limit नहीं है, SECC criteria से decide होता है

4b5b3a45b94ef188582dafc25bd26e6d.message: किसी को रिपीट कर रहा है
4b5b3a45b94ef188582dafc25bd26e6d.response: मैं नागरिक मुद्दों में मदद के लिए यहाँ हूँ। आप समस्याओं की रिपोर्ट कर सकते हैं, शिकायतों को ट्रैक कर सकते हैं, या मुझसे वाणी के बारे में सवाल पूछ सकते हैं। आप क्या जानना चाहेंगे?

25fb44dd08e0ea4c667d357a029466db.message: what documents is needed for ration card?
25fb44dd08e0ea4c667d357a029466db.response: To make ration card, you will need identity proof, address proof and income certificate. You can apply online on your state food supply portal.

4e02f6ece2ea426d35e9642b760d0a41.response: Vaani is a smart AI assistant that helps people with government services and civic complaints. Here you can report issues like road, water, electricity and sanitation.

f5f72bfa32d248e06a8159eaaa407784.response: अगर पानी supply नहीं आ रही है तो आप water supply complaint register कर सकते हो।

7bad36023db4804fe9e6e6a1c8f9d49b.response: वाणी एक नागरिक जुड़ाव मंच है जहाँ आप अपने क्षेत्र में सड़क क्षति, पानी की आपूर्ति, या कचरा संग्रह जैसी समस्याओं की रिपोर्ट कर सकते हैं। आप शिकायतें दर्ज कर सकते हैं, उनकी स्थिति ट्रैक कर सकते हैं, और स्वयंसेवक सहायता प्राप्त कर सकते हैं। यह उपयोग करने के लिए मुफ्त है।

a1900979bbd5a8052b0eda48f4f43c5c.response: समस्या की रिपोर्ट करने के लिए: पहले, 'शिकायत दर्ज करें' कहें और मैं फॉर्म खोल दूंगी। आप गड्ढे, पानी के रिसाव, टूटी स्ट्रीटलाइट, कचरे की समस्या, या कोई भी नागरिक मुद्दा रिपोर्ट कर सकते हैं।
